title: hieracium interveniens
intro: Hieracium interveniens, also known as Devil's-bit scabious, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Hieracium interveniens include its potential to alleviate symptoms of hay fever, eczema, and skin conditions, as well as its possible antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Hieracium interveniens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
